name: Axiom
description: Axiom log management and observability platform. Query datasets using APL (Axiom Processing Language), ingest events, and manage datasets for structured log analysis.

tools.name: query_dataset
tools.description: Execute an APL (Axiom Processing Language) query against your datasets. Supports filtering, aggregation, and time-range queries. Use the 'format' parameter to control output format.

apl.description: The APL query string to execute. Example: "['my-dataset'] | where status == 500 | count"

startTime.description: Start time for the query range in ISO 8601 format (e.g. '2025-01-01T00:00:00Z'). Optional.

endTime.description: End time for the query range in ISO 8601 format (e.g. '2025-01-02T00:00:00Z'). Optional.

format.description: Response format. Use 'tabular' for a table-like response. Defaults to 'legacy'.

tools.name: ingest_events
tools.description: Ingest one or more events into a specified Axiom dataset. Send an array of JSON objects to be stored as log/event entries.

dataset.description: The name of the dataset to ingest events into.

events.description: Array of event objects to ingest. Each object is a JSON record with arbitrary fields.

tools.name: list_datasets
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all datasets in your Axiom organization. Returns dataset names, descriptions, creation dates, and field information.

tools.name: create_dataset
tools.description: Create a new dataset in your Axiom organization. Specify the dataset name and an optional description.

name.description: Name of the dataset to create. Must be unique within the organization.
